subject: fix(pattern): closure-scoped rawMarkdown, manifest fetch timeout
body:
- Moved rawMarkdown from window.__rawMarkdown back to closure scope,
  eliminating global namespace pollution
- Added 10-second AbortController timeout to the manifest.json fetch
  (previously had no timeout — page would hang indefinitely)
- Extracted headerHtml() and showError() helpers to deduplicate the
  header rendering and error display logic

Tags: fix, patterns, reliability
Complexity: 1
Urgency: 2
Impact: user-facing
Risk: low
Debt: paid
Epic: pattern-alignment
Semver: patch
